name: immunization-panel
title: Immunization Panel
description: Immunization status by schedule group, with an optional recently-administered list. Composes WidgetPanel + ImmunizationSchedule + VaccinationRecordRow.

props.name: groups
props.description: Schedule groups (childhood, adolescent, seasonal…) with rows.

clinicalNotes: Grouping by schedule (childhood / adolescent / seasonal) mirrors how immunization status is actually assessed and makes due/overdue vaccines pop for catch-up. Pair the forward-looking schedule with a recently-administered list that carries lot number and provider — the details required for adverse-event traceability and record reconciliation.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds the Patient Chart and Consumer blocks.
